title: CatTech 2
description: a tech, magic, and exploration-focused NeoForge pack
body:
# CatTech 2

<details>
<summary>Version info</summary>

Current latest pack version: `1.2.1` \
Current Minecraft version: `1.21.1` \
Current NeoForge version: `21.1.213`
</details>

**CatTech 2** is a whimsical kitchen-sink pack focused on tech, magic, and exploration. It is designed only to be novel, quirky, and fun, not to have any sort of goal or balance in mind. Build, tinker, and progress however you wish.

Content may be added over time. Save-breaking changes and/or major mod additions will be marked by new major versions. Versions >1.1.0 of this pack are generated with [packwiz](https://packwiz.infra.link/) and support sidedness for use with [packwiz-installer](https://github.com/packwiz/packwiz-installer). See [this wiki page](https://packwiz.infra.link/tutorials/installing/packwiz-installer/) for more details.

Standout mods include:
- **Tech & Automation**: Industry with Create, Mekanism, and Industrial Foregoing. Systems and storage with AE2 and ComputerCraft.
- **Magic & Supernatural**: Iron's Spells & Spellbooks, Mahou Tsukai, Malum, and Vampirism
- **World Gen & Dimensions**: New dimensions with Aether, Eternal Starlight, and Stellaris, plus support for Twilight Forest. Biome and structure overhauls with CTOV, Biomes O' Plenty, YUNG's suite, and others.
- **Gear & Mobs**: New and overhauled mobs aplenty. Accessories API, Relics, and Artifacts for doodads. Simply Swords and Simply More for weapons. Bonded for progression. Vic's Point Blank, because that creeper in your house deserves to be featured in a bodycam clip.
- **Quality of Life**: A vast suite of modern UI mods such as EMI, Jade, Xaero's Maps, and more. Small gameplay tweaks here and there.
- **Performance & Fidelity**: Distant Horizons A comprehensive suite of perfomance mods including the usual Sodium, Iris, and Lithium, along with many small sound and visual tweaks.
- **Tools & Plugins**: WorldEdit, Chunky, and performance analysis tools for builders, server operators, and JVM tuners.

## Full Mod List

#### ⚠ IMPORTANT NOTE ⚠
This modpack includes some compatibility and content patches for [The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest), which is not hosted on Modrinth. The patch mods are included, but disabled by default. If you would like, please support TF by downloading it separately from the developers' preferred platform. Remember to enable the related patches manually.

##### † Clientside only
##### ‡ Serverside only
